Configuration for OpenOCD to use J-Link interface with SWD transport.

# Purpose
The configuration file initializes a J-Link interface by sourcing the `interface/jlink.cfg` file. It then selects the Serial Wire Debug (SWD) protocol as the transport method for communication.
